headline: These dow jones stocks are moving in today's session
summary: Stay informed about the performance of the dow jones index one hour before the close of the markets on Thursday. Uncover the top gainers and losers in today's session for valuable insights.

headline: Jim Cramer Highlights Strong Travel Numbers as Fuel for American Express
summary: On July 21, during CNBC’s Mad Money program, host Jim Cramer used the daily chart analysis by options trader Bob Lang, founder of Explosive Options, to examine American Express Company (NYSE:AXP). Cramer pointed to the company’s distinct cardholder demographic and high-margin annual fee structure, as he highlighted why the premium card issuer remains a long-time […]

headline: Jim Cramer Highlights Visa (V) as Consumer Credit Demand Soars
summary: During the Tuesday episode of Mad Money, host Jim Cramer discussed the major credit card networks as he noted that consumer spending remains resilient. He began by highlighting the broader economic data and noted that roughly 81% of Americans hold a credit card, averaging three to four cards per consumer, with cardholders using about 29% […]

headline: Will American Express or Verizon Come Out as an Earnings Winner?
summary: American Express and Verizon both report Q2 earnings the same morning, and the prediction markets, analyst ratings, and price targets are telling three different stories about which stock Wall Street actually trusts heading into the print.

headline: Ameriprise Financial’s (NYSE:AMP) Q2 CY2026: Beats On Revenue
summary: Financial services company Ameriprise Financial (NYSE:AMP) reported revenue ahead of Wall Street’s expectations in Q2 CY2026, with sales up 15.6% year on year to $5.01 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $11.07 per share was 2.4% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: American Express and ALL Accor Expand the Power of Membership with New Global Partnership
summary: American Express and ALL Accor, Accor's booking platform and loyalty program, announced a new global partnership rolling out beginning in 2026 across 12 locations, introducing elite status matching and a new Membership Rewards® points transfer option for eligible Card Members.

headline: American Express (AXP) Expands Accor Rewards And Paymode B2B Partnerships
summary: American Express (NYSE:AXP) and Accor’s ALL loyalty program have launched a global partnership that introduces points transfer and elite status matching across multiple countries. Separately, American Express is working with Bottomline to integrate the Paymode network into its Business IQ for Payments (BIP) platform, aimed at digitizing and streamlining U.S. B2B transactions. These moves put American Express at the intersection of travel loyalty and B2B payment infrastructure, two areas...
